de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util

Class SymbolicExecutionEnvironment<U extends UserInterfaceControl>

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.control.KeYEnvironment<U>
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util.SymbolicExecutionEnvironment<U>

  • public class SymbolicExecutionEnvironment<U extends UserInterfaceControl>
extends KeYEnvironment<U>
    Instances of this class are used to collect and access all relevant information for symbolic execution tree extraction of Proofs via an SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder builder
      The SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder for execution tree extraction.

      • getBuilder

        public SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder getBuilder()
        Returns the SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder for execution tree extraction.

        The SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder for execution tree extraction.

      • getProof

        public Proof getProof()
        Returns the Proof of getBuilder().

        The Proof of getBuilder().

      • configureProofForSymbolicExecution

        public static void configureProofForSymbolicExecution(Proof proof,
                                                      int maximalNumberOfNodesPerBranch)
        Configures the given Proof to use the symbolic execution strategy by reusing the default StrategyProperties.
        Parameters:
        proof - The Proof to configure.
        maximalNumberOfNodesPerBranch - The maximal number of nodes per branch.

      • configureProofForSymbolicExecution

        public static void configureProofForSymbolicExecution(Proof proof,
                                                      int maximalNumberOfNodesPerBranch,
                                                      boolean methodTreatmentContract,
                                                      boolean loopTreatmentInvariant,
                                                      boolean blockTreatmentContract,
                                                      boolean nonExecutionBranchHidingSideProofs,
                                                      boolean aliasChecks)
        Configures the given Proof to use the symbolic execution strategy.
        Parameters:
        proof - The Proof to configure.
        maximalNumberOfNodesPerBranch - The maximal number of nodes per branch.
        methodTreatmentContract - true use operation contracts, false expand methods.
        loopTreatmentInvariant - true use invariants, false expand loops.
        blockTreatmentContract - Block contracts or expand otherwise?
        nonExecutionBranchHidingSideProofs - true hide non execution branch labels by side proofs, false do not hide execution branch labels.
        aliasChecks - Do alias checks?

      • dispose

        public void dispose()
        Disposes this KeYEnvironment.
        Overrides:
        dispose in class KeYEnvironment<U extends UserInterfaceControl>
